title: Device Settings - Check if setting's value persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Verify that all HS settings values persist after closing and reopening the tab, navigating away and back, and killing and restarting the app.
steps: Change values in all settings (should be changeable).
Close and reopen the tab, then check values (should persist).
Go to Home page and return to settings, then check values (should persist).
Kill and restart the app, then check values (should persist).
expected: Setting values persist after closing the tab, settings page, or the app.
